import type { ReverseSegment, SourceMapSegment } from './sourcemap-segment.mts'; export default function maybeSort(mappings: SourceMapSegment[][], owned: boolean): SourceMapSegment[][]; export declare function sortComparator<T extends SourceMapSegment | ReverseSegment>(a: T, b: T): number; //# sourceMappingURL=sort.d.ts.map
